Module org.flossware.commons
Package org.flossware.commons

Interface Stringifiable

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractStringifiable
public interface Stringifiable
API to convert an object to a StringBuilder and makes it pretty.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Scot P. Floess

    static final String
    DEFAULT_PREFIX
    A default prefix to use.

    System property name for line separator.

    The line separator string for this system.

    Using prefix return the string representation of self.

  • Method Details

    • toStringBuilder

      StringBuilder toStringBuilder(StringBuilder stringBuilder, String prefix)
      Using stringBuilder, compute the string representation of self whose prefix for computation is prefix.
      Parameters:
      stringBuilder - will have the string representation of self appended.
      prefix - is the prefix to be first appended prior to self's string representation.
      Returns:
      a string builder that can be reused.
      Since:
      1.0

    • toStringBuilder

      StringBuilder toStringBuilder(StringBuilder stringBuilder)
      Using stringBuilder, compute the string representation of self.
      Parameters:
      stringBuilder - will have the string representation of self appended.
      Returns:
      a string builder that can be reused.
      Since:
      1.0

    • toStringBuilder

      StringBuilder toStringBuilder(String prefix)
      Using prefix return the string representation of self.
      Parameters:
      prefix - is the prefix to emit when return the string representation of self.
      Returns:
      the string representation of self.
      Since:
      1.0
